diff --git a/src/handler.rs b/src/handler.rs
index 3b1a2c4..9e7f0aa 100644
--- a/src/handler.rs
+++ b/src/handler.rs
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ impl Handler {
     pub async fn respond(&self, req: Request) -> Response {
-        let delay = self.config.latency_ms.unwrap();
+        let delay = self.config.latency_ms.unwrap_or(0);
         tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(delay)).await;
         Response::empty(StatusCode::OK)
     }
@@ -30,6 +30,15 @@ impl Handler {
         }
     }
+
+    /// Regression test: a client that doesn't set `latency_ms` used to panic the handler
+    /// on `unwrap()`, even though doing nothing is the one thing this service is supposed
+    /// to never fail at.
+    #[cfg(test)]
+    mod tests {
+        use super::*;
+
+        #[tokio::test]
+        async fn respond_without_latency_config_does_not_panic() {
+            let handler = Handler::new(Config::default());
+            let resp = handler.respond(Request::empty()).await;
+            assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK);
+        }
+    }
 }
